title: Level 113

{{DISPLAYTITLE: Level 113 Ways To Prepare a Pomegranate!}}{{Background|file=Imageimage.png}} {{User:Codred23/Pomegranate.css}} {{CSS|content= @import url('https://fonts.cdnfonts.com/css/traveling-typewriter'); }} __NOTOC__
{{Blurimage|file=FRUIT.png|align=center|caption=An image of an individual pomegranate locule, taken from outside its boundaries.|width=360px}} ==Exocarp== {{Blurimage|file=CRIMSON.png|align=right|width=340px|caption=An image taken of multiple locules, looking over the skin of the pomegranate.}} The pomegranate is a large urban area perpetuating in a crimson or purple-esque twilight, akin to the surface of the fruit of the same name. The locules contained within the pomegranate are spacious and unnaturally ripe-looking. Locules are usually crowded and compressed against one another. The rind is the ground a seed walks on, with properties similar to those of asphalt concrete, but it feels strangely dry, leathery, and pitted. Stamens, fibrous stalks that grow directly from the rind, light up the desolate city. At the tip of each stamen is an anther—fleshy, glowing orbs that emit a rhythmic, amber pulse, similar to that of a heartbeat. You're not the only one with a heart here. Occasionally, septa and piths, or even entire locules, may show signs of rot and decay after prolonged stay. These properties include, but are not limited to, an anomalously mushy texture, slight dilapidation, and, most notably, a foul smell. When one encounters a rotting septum, it is advised to avoid said area, as it is usually a sign of structural fragility. Or worse, a seed may start to experience rot itself. Symptoms of seeds affected by rot include a depraved or unnatural mental state gradually getting worse, a warped or distorted physical/biological appearance, nihilism, the spilling of their delicate crimson fluids, and the elimination of all pronoun usage. During their stay, seeds are more organically inclined to remain within rather than to make an active effort to drop. The fruit exhibits a phenomenon unique among similar levels. [[Phenomenon 15]] makes a space project individual versions of itself for every seed that rolls upon it, effectively isolating itself. Here, this phenomenon works differently. Seeds are not separated from each other initially, and it is plausible for one seed to interact with another early on. However, as a seed traverses further into the space, it gradually becomes more isolated until it is functionally isolated. It has no way of talking to any other seed ever again. The harvest doesn't act out of malice at first glance. It wants to study you first. It is interested in you. It is interested in the concept of you. And ultimately, it will want to be you. ==Parasites== The fruit is quite fresh, so parasitical influence is almost always not accounted for, (potentially) except for some unfortunate individual harvests. However, this does not make the fruit any less dangerous to consume, as biological imperfections (such as the aforementioned rot) are still prominent. Do not indulge. An existing theory is that the pomegranate itself is an anomaly, but this is not proven to be true.[[File:113- Pomegranate Worship.mp3|thumb]] ==Pulps and Endocarps == ===Cultus Sancti=== It is important to note that Cultus Sancti's name is entirely the creation of [[M.E.G.|MEG]]'s Department of Research. The cult itself is notorious for lacking an identity, symbols, and a logo, making it considerably more difficult to track. Cultus Sancti is a cultist organization worshipping the thing behind pomegranates. While they do not operate on the grounds of the pomegranate itself, they do operate within levels that are habitable and have a large population of seeds, such as [[Level 1]] and so on. They are obsessed with being one with the area. The concept of ego and individuality to them is frankly disgusting. They view all seeds who prioritize freedom of thought as too weak to bear the ultimate truth. According to the seeds who have escaped from said cults, new recruits are often made to destroy and burn all their IDs that may be affiliated with other groups. Their photos, letters, and evidence of their personal history are also destroyed completely. They are made to sit in total silence for a full month to drain their old selves, leaving them vulnerable to the preying hivemind of the worshippers. They intentionally enter the pomegranate, a fresh seed among many others. Initially, their worship is passionate and beautiful, but slowly the worshipping hivemind degenerates their vocalization into scats and inhuman sounds. They cannot recognize this change, and their song becomes a lulling cacophony. The [[M.E.G.|MEG]] are actively identifying members of the cult and rehabilitating them, as the cult poses a potential threat to the ontological stability of the entire [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]]. ==Opening and Extraction== ===Opening=== It is worth noting that pomegranates are indehiscent, meaning that they rarely naturally split open, which means if a seed wants to open one, they have to be deliberate about it. They must use force to break through it rather than find splits or imperfections to enter. *Having sufficient knowledge about the thing behind pomegranates, whether through cult affiliation, written information, or verbal information, will provide a seed with a higher chance of opening the pomegranate, as long as you intentionally do it. Please note that this also hinders a seed's chances of safe extraction from it as well. *Sometimes, just being related or affiliated to certain seeds or noospheric, symbolic locules (without active participation) that have sufficient knowledge about the thing behind pomegranates will also increase a seed's chances of opening the pomegranate. Still, this method is usually more accidental than intentional. *There is a non-zero chance of a seed accidentally opening the pomegranate even when not having any knowledge of the thing behind it specifically, especially if they are interested in the following topics: cityscapes, crimson-like colors, fruit (especially pomegranates), philosophy, etc. ===Extraction=== *If a seed has entered the parasite's domain, it is difficult to extract itself from the food. However, with enough mental force, seeds can potentially force themselves out. However, they will never stop gradually dripping juice. They will never forget. They will always want to be part of the organism. Its beauty is irresistible.

{{POI|name=Patient Zero; [IDENTIFICATION LOST]|status=Unknown|location=There.|affiliations=Unknown|seen=Probably somewhere safe.}}

[[File:Error41.jpg|center|frameless|600px]]









'''13th of June''' Oh, how I so long for my old life back there, yet I can never truly reach it or feel it again. I used to be a chef for a small family restaurant. We specialized in pomegranate pie, which was pretty much why the restaurant was well-known around the area. The restaurant's been open for a few decades now, though I'm not sure if they're still open. I still remember the weight of the silver paring knife, the red juices, and the whirring blades of the blender. The restaurant had a name. I know it did. But it's slipping away from my memory. All I can really make out... gold leaf... board... gold leaf... whatever that mascot was... I guess The Wake does things to your mind. Right now, I'm living in this base in [[Level 1]]. They call themselves "The Raiders", and they're pretty friendly. They help out a lot. However, they get into a lot of violence with other groups. Small price to pay for survival, I guess. ---- '''14th of June''' For some reason, I am starting to associate things with... a concept—a concept I can't really make out. But whenever I try to visualize something, it always pops up. Like a reminder. I'm not sure what it's reminding me of, or if it's even a reminder at all. But it's calling me. I hear it's calls, it's desperate. No, maybe this is just me going insane. Voices in my head. Whatever. I really need rest I guess. Now The Raiders are doing more shit to piss off more groups. I don't even know if we have enough people or supplies for that. I won't complain though. I guess it's been a while since I got to experience actual shelter, food and protection. And I have this for sanity. I still long to go back to my original home, but what are the chances the government recognizes me as an existing human being? Otherwise, nothing really happened much, so I'll end the day here. [[File:Sketch.png|center|270px|frameless|link=]]
(sketch i did lol)
---- '''15th of June''' Maybe the signs aren't correct but maybe just maybe I might be going insane. Last night I had a weird dream. Not a nightmare, just a really... peculiar dream. I was in a space of nothing. A void, you could say. Floating. It wanted me to "fade in". I did not understand what it meant. But then I saw a flash of light. And I was in a cityscape. It felt... warm. The sky was crimson-red. The breeze struck through my cheeks. Wandering, I stumbled upon a restaurant. Oh how it resembled the one I yearned to go back to. But it started to fade. Nononono it couldn't fade away from me! And then I started to fade. I started to rot with it. No! And I woke up. ... Maybe I just need to stop remembering. Yes... that will stop the yearning. ---- '''17th of June''' It won't stop. I've tried talking to the other members for help and they've all told me to shrug it off or "get well". It won't stop. I don't call things what they are anymore. I don't call myself what I am anymore. "Susie" yes "Susie" "Susie" that name doesn't have meaning anymore. Am I still me? Why is this happening to me? What am I? What is this? Writing? The thing it's guiding me somewhere let it guide me onwards please let me be free NONONO YES OF COURSE WHAT AM I THINKING. YES! maybe no? don't be ridiculous!! [[File:Restaurantplsno.png|center|frameless|320px|link=]] Cmon Susie... get your senses together... you're better than this... Cmon... Was the restaurant ever real in the first place ? ---- '''23rd of June''' Ive barely been writing this anymore but now I can't distinguish anything. Like literally ANYTHING. I see my colleague's face. It reminds me of it. I see this diary, it reminds me of it again. the pen I use to write this was now simply it, and so was the hellhole I was trapped in, and so was the restaurant, and so was the ground I walked on, and so was the air I breathed, and so was the atoms that make up of me. and so was me myself. ive had breakdowns without even knowing and the dreams the "sweet" dreams kept getting louder and louder and longer may god save us all but is god any different than it. ---- '''it of it'''
